headline: How Investors Are Reacting To FirstEnergy (FE) Data Center Load Growth Ahead of Q1 2026 Earnings
summary: FirstEnergy Corporation recently announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 results on April 28 after the market close, with performance shaped by load growth and infrastructure investments alongside higher operation and maintenance expenses. An important angle for investors is how rising data center and industrial electricity demand could interact with ongoing grid upgrade programs to influence FirstEnergy’s earnings mix and cost profile. With earnings set to reflect rising data...

headline: Plant it Forward: FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Celebrates Earth and Arbor Days with Free Trees in Westmoreland County
summary: Employee volunteers from FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA), a FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) company doing business as West Penn Power, will be giving away trees in Westmoreland County as part of extended Arbor Day celebrations.
